seoTitle: Hayborough vs Hazelwood Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hayborough and Hazelwood Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hayborough vs Hazelwood Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hayborough and Hazelwood Park.
heading: Hayborough vs Hazelwood Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hayborough, South Australia and Hazelwood Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hazelwood Park has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Hayborough (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hayborough or Hazelwood Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hayborough has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Hazelwood Park scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hayborough scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Hazelwood Park scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hayborough or Hazelwood Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hazelwood Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
